fields.title: EnRead LMS
fields.description: University-level Learning Management System enabling textbook purchases, academic material access, dynamic quiz systems, and role-based user control. Built responsive frontend architecture integrated with backend services.

fields.title: Django Blog Platform
fields.description: Full-stack blog system with authentication, likes system, comments, image uploads, and dynamic user-based rendering.

fields.title: Django + JS Interactive CRUD System
fields.description: Asynchronous data management system using Fetch API with CSRF protection and JSON-based communication.
